This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] audio.muted reflects an extreme playbackRate
  assert_true: muted at a very high playbackRate expected true got false
[FAIL] audio.muted reflects an extreme playbackRate after the muted setter
  assert_true: an extreme playbackRate mutes even after muted was set to false expected true got false
[FAIL] video.muted reflects an extreme playbackRate
  assert_true: muted at a very high playbackRate expected true got false
[FAIL] video.muted reflects an extreme playbackRate after the muted setter
  assert_true: an extreme playbackRate mutes even after muted was set to false expected true got false
Harness: the test ran to completion.
